---
title: "EPI packages for R"
---

Installation instructions are available on each package’s Github page.

[epiverse](https://economic.github.io/epiverse/)

-   now you can load all of EPI's R packages in one go! `epiverse` includes the libraries you know and love (realtalk, epidatatools, and epiextractr), as well as two hot new packages!
    -   [prefab](https://economic.github.io/prefab/) is an opinionated theme system for R project scaffolding

    -   [swadlr](https://economic.github.io/swadlr/) allows users to pull and manipulate data from the [State of Working America Data Library](https://data.epi.org/)

[realtalk](https://economic.github.io/realtalk/)

-   realtalk makes it easy to load and use common US price indexes in R.

[epidatatools](https://economic.github.io/epidatatools/)

-   epidatatools contains functions we find useful at [EPI](https://epi.org/) that don't have exact analogues elsewhere in the R package ecosystem.

[epiextractr](https://economic.github.io/epiextractr)

-   use epiextractr to download CPS data from the [EPI microdata site](https://microdata.epi.org/).
